name: Mastodon
description: Mastodon is a decentralized, open-source social network based on ActivityPub. The API allows agents to post statuses, browse timelines, interact with posts, search content, manage accounts, upload media, handle notifications, vote on polls, and manage bookmarks and favorites.

capabilities.name: status_create
capabilities.description: Publish a new status (toot) with text, media, content warnings, and visibility settings.

capabilities.name: status_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single status by its ID with content, author, media, and engagement counts.

capabilities.name: statuses_get_multiple
capabilities.description: Retrieve multiple statuses by their IDs.

capabilities.name: status_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one of your own statuses.

capabilities.name: status_edit
capabilities.description: Edit a previously posted status to change text, sensitivity, media, or poll.

capabilities.name: status_context_get
capabilities.description: Get parent and child statuses in the thread of a given status.

capabilities.name: status_translate
capabilities.description: Translate a status into a specified language.

capabilities.name: status_reblog
capabilities.description: Boost (reblog) a status to share it with your followers.

capabilities.name: status_unreblog
capabilities.description: Undo a boost of a status.

capabilities.name: status_favourite
capabilities.description: Add a status to your favourites list.

capabilities.name: status_unfavourite
capabilities.description: Remove a status from your favourites list.

capabilities.name: status_bookmark
capabilities.description: Privately bookmark a status.

capabilities.name: status_unbookmark
capabilities.description: Remove a status from your bookmarks.

capabilities.name: status_pin
capabilities.description: Pin a status to the top of your profile.

capabilities.name: status_unpin
capabilities.description: Unpin a status from your profile.

capabilities.name: status_mute
capabilities.description: Mute notifications for a conversation thread.

capabilities.name: status_reblogged_by_list
capabilities.description: View who boosted a given status.

capabilities.name: status_favourited_by_list
capabilities.description: View who favourited a given status.

capabilities.name: status_history_get
capabilities.description: View the edit history of a status.

capabilities.name: timeline_home_get
capabilities.description: Fetch the home timeline of statuses from followed users.

capabilities.name: timeline_public_get
capabilities.description: Fetch the public (local or federated) timeline.

capabilities.name: timeline_hashtag_get
capabilities.description: Fetch public statuses containing a given hashtag.

capabilities.name: timeline_list_get
capabilities.description: Fetch statuses from a specific list timeline.

capabilities.name: account_verify_credentials
capabilities.description: Verify the current access token and get the authenticated account.

capabilities.name: account_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve profile information for a specific account.

capabilities.name: account_statuses_list
capabilities.description: Get statuses posted by a specific account.

capabilities.name: account_followers_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of accounts following a given account.

capabilities.name: account_following_list
capabilities.description: Get accounts that a given account follows.

capabilities.name: account_follow
capabilities.description: Follow a given account.

capabilities.name: account_unfollow
capabilities.description: Unfollow a given account.

capabilities.name: account_block
capabilities.description: Block a given account.

capabilities.name: account_unblock
capabilities.description: Unblock a given account.

capabilities.name: account_mute
capabilities.description: Mute a given account.

capabilities.name: account_unmute
capabilities.description: Unmute a given account.

capabilities.name: account_relationships_get
capabilities.description: Check relationships (follow, block, mute) with specified accounts.

capabilities.name: accounts_search
capabilities.description: Search for accounts by username or display name.

capabilities.name: account_update_credentials
capabilities.description: Update the authenticated user display name, bio, avatar, and preferences.

capabilities.name: search_v2
capabilities.description: Search for accounts, statuses, and hashtags matching a query.

capabilities.name: notifications_list
capabilities.description: Get a paginated list of notifications including mentions, follows, boosts, and favourites.

capabilities.name: notification_get
capabilities.description: View a single notification by ID.

capabilities.name: notifications_clear
capabilities.description: Clear all notifications.

capabilities.name: notification_dismiss
capabilities.description: Dismiss a specific notification.

capabilities.name: media_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a media attachment for use with a new status.

capabilities.name: media_get
capabilities.description: Get a media attachment to check processing status.

capabilities.name: media_update
capabilities.description: Update media attachment description or focus point before posting.

capabilities.name: poll_get
capabilities.description: View a poll attached to a status.

capabilities.name: poll_vote
capabilities.description: Vote on a poll attached to a status.

capabilities.name: bookmarks_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of bookmarked statuses.

capabilities.name: favourites_list
capabilities.description: Get a list of favourited statuses.
